## InteractiveMode.install() method

Install interactive mode onto a yargs instance. Also accepts a factory function to rebuild yargs (needed for clean re-parsing).

**Signature:**

```typescript
install(yargsInstance: Argv<T>, yargsFactory?: () => Argv<T>): Argv<T>;
```
